notes: Logical Q02 row is anchored on EURUSD.DWX to evaluate the EURUSD/GBPUSD Gatev-GGR pair as one market-neutral sleeve instead of duplicate single-leg work items.

AUDUSD.DWX and NZDUSD.DWX remain declared because the EA warmup path selects all registered pair symbols on init; their pair should be queued as a separate host-selected logical sleeve in a later unit if this repair holds.
